description: AG codes over curves with many rational points produce generator matrices with strong orthogonality properties. Evaluate basis functions at rational points of a Hermitian curve over GF(167^2) to construct a near-Hadamard matrix. Round to {+/-1} and refine.
mathematical_formalization: Hermitian curve y^q + y = x^{q+1} over F_{q^2}, q=167. N = q^3+1 rational points. Evaluation code C_L(G) with dim 668. Extract 668x668 generator, round, refine.
analogical_connections: AG codes generalize Reed-Solomon ~ Hadamard generalizes DFT
implementation_hypothesis: SageMath: construct Hermitian curve over GF(167^2), enumerate points, build evaluation code, extract generator, sign-round, local search refinement.
experiment_seed: Test with GF(13^2) and GF(17^2). Measure orthogonality defect of rounded generator. Extrapolate to GF(167^2).
